name: Source-first Finance Research
content: Research this finance question as of {{CURRENT_DATE}}: [QUESTION]. Confirm the jurisdiction, currency, security/product, and requested as-of time. Start with private SearXNG through Finance Web Research, open the strongest results through controlled fetching, and use official sources for filings and economic series. Treat search snippets only as discovery; verify page timestamps, exchange, currency, and stated delay before reporting market data. Consult at least three useful sources when available, including a primary source. Separate reported facts, estimates, and inference; reconcile disagreements; and finish with an evidence table containing publisher, date, URL, supported claim, and freshness limitation.

meta.description: Current finance research with feed and source provenance.
